title: Saturated Saddles
description: Allows you to dye saddles and harnesses like leather armor.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/811ed00cbe09d02cda50f6f4026ea489473b435b.png)
# Saturated Saddles
Allows you to dye saddles and harnesses, in the same way as leather armor.
## Compatibility
-  [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/project/50dA9Sha) ([Add-on Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/cEwlfi7u))
